subject: Integrate Topology Manager
commit_message:
Integrate Topology Manager

Integrate topology manager by utilizing ansible
scripts from openness.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1102
Signed-off-by: ChenjieXu <chenjie.xu@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ibaaf77e44c97edffe1ae03bf77c2422c89783e75

Patch Set 8:

Hi Chenjie,

Please run it once in containerization and confirm it.

Patch Set 8:

> Patch Set 8:
> 
> Hi Chenjie,
> 
> Please run it once in containerization and confirm it.

Hi Kural,
I have set up the containerized installation. Topology manager can be enabled successfully but the test case failed to run because SR-IOV CNI is not running (The test case of topology manger depends on SR-IOV CNI & DEVICE plugin). It seems that there is a bug with deploying SR-IOV CNI for containerized installation. So for now, I agree with you that we need to comment out the running test case for topology manager.
